title: hedeoma mollis
intro: Hedeoma mollis, also known as creeping pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Hedeoma mollis include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and bloating, as well as reduced inflammation and improved respiratory function. Hedeoma mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for various health issues.
